About Us

Everything ARX stands for

🔒

Your hardware, your rules

ARX runs entirely on hardware you own. No remote servers, no middlemen. Control isn't a setting — it's the architecture.

Local first
🙋

Simple for everyday life

Host your media, block your ads, run your AI — all from your own machine. Powerful tools that don't require a computer science degree.

Consumer
🏢

Built for real work

Legal, medical, finance — professionals who need software that works reliably, stays in their control, and doesn't answer to anyone else.

Enterprise
⚡

What's yours stays yours

No subscriptions. No lock-in. No fine print. Ownership is the foundation everything else is built on — not a feature bolted on at the end.

By design

What we offer

Our products

Available now

ARX Kyvera

A self-hosted server platform that puts you in charge. One install gives you media hosting, ad-blocking, VPN, and Theo — your own AI assistant — all running on your hardware.

  • Media hosting, ad-blocking & VPN
  • Local AI via Theo — runs on your hardware
  • File storage & server management
  • One-click install, zero config
